sample_raw: 1 = meets criterion, 0 = does not meet, NA = not applicable. RULES: * Output EXACTLY one line per item, in this format and nothing else: ID: SCORE | one-line rationale * SCORE must be 1, 0, or NA. * Do not add explanations outside the lines. RUBRIC ITEMS: U1: Uses plain, everyday language -- Words a caregiver uses; jargon defined. U2: Information is organized logically -- Most important info first

1.  1\. Time from first medical contact to first ECG

2.  2\. Time from first ECG to first medical contact

3.  3\. Time from first medical contact to first dose of aspirin

4.  4\. Time from first medical contact to first dose of clopidogrel

5.  5\. Time from first medical contact to first dose of fibrinolytic agent

6.  6\. Time from first medical contact to first dose of heparin

7.  7\. Time

U1: 1 | Uses plain language, defines jargon.
U2: 1 | Information is organized logically.
U3: 1 | Focuses on key messages.
A1: 1 | Provides specific, actionable steps.
A2: 0 | No barriers addressed.

A1: 1 | Actionable steps are provided.
A2: 0 | No barriers are addressed.
